title: Tchad : nomination du PCA de l’AAZES
originalTitle: Chad: appointment of the AAZES PCA
translatedDescription:
By Decree No. 3011/PR/2025 of December 12, 2025, Mr. Moussa Kadam is appointed Chairman of the Board of Directors of the Agency for the Administration of Special Economic Zones (AAZES).

description:

title: Période de fraîcheur et d’harmattan : Prévenir les maladies respiratoires
originalTitle: Coolness and harmattan: Preventing respiratory diseases
translatedDescription: With the arrival of coolness since November, several respiratory diseases typical of the season are reappearing. Knowing these common conditions and taking the right steps is key to reducing risk during this time.
description: Avec l’installation de la fraîcheur depuis le mois de novembre, plusieurs maladies respiratoires typiques de la saison réapparaissent. Connaître ces affections courantes et adopter de bons gestes sont essentiels pour réduire les risques durant cette période.
categories: Antibiotic use and stewardship, Asthma, Influenza, Stampede, panic, trauma, Cough, Respiratory Symptoms, Bronchitis, Rhinitis
